name: gary-extension (SA3 Ableton Extension)
author: betweentwomidnights
description: Brings Stable Audio 3 (SA3) generation, transformation, and continuation to audio tracks via three right-click actions: Transform, Continue, and Generate Selection. Requires an SA3 HTTP backend, or use the experimental v0.1.0 builds with an embedded sa3.cpp engine shipped as separate CPU, Vulkan, CUDA, and Mac Metal .ablx variants.
notes: The author marks this as a development/experimental build.
